phase_statuses.title: Split the permission group page into focused render components
phase_statuses.objective: Move major page render sections into bounded feature components while keeping `PermissionGroupManagement.js` as the composition page and preserving `usePermissionGroupManagementPage` as the page-state owner.

acceptance_criteria.text: `PermissionGroupManagement.js` no longer directly owns the toolbar, sidebar wrapper, status/delete-confirmation block, and editor panel markup in one file.
the page continues to consume the same `usePermissionGroupManagementPage` state/action contract without page-level behavior changes.
toolbar actions, pending-delete confirmation, and editor rendering continue surfacing the existing states instead of introducing fallback paths.

phase_statuses.notes: - - Split the permission-group route page into focused sidebar and editor components while preserving the page-hook contract.

phase_statuses.title: Focused frontend regression validation and task evidence
phase_statuses.objective: Prove the bounded page refactor preserved current permission-group page behavior.

acceptance_criteria.text: focused permission-group page Jest suites pass against the final code state.
task artifacts record the exact commands run, verified acceptance coverage, and bounded residual risk.

phase_statuses.notes: - - Focused Jest evidence recorded for the permission-group page-hook and page suites with bounded residual risk documented in task artifacts.

goal: 继续进行前后端重构直到重构结束：本 tranche 聚焦 fronted/src/pages/PermissionGroupManagement.js，拆分工具栏、文件夹树侧栏、状态与删除确认区域、编辑器面板等页面区块，保持 usePermissionGroupManagementPage 契约与现有 Jest 测试行为稳定
